name: My Sheep Hear My Voice
oracleText: Creatures you control get +0/+1 and have ward {1}. Whenever you cast a creature spell, scry 1.
flavorText: "My sheep hear my voice, and I know them, and they follow me." — John 10:27
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Bernhard Plockhorst's "The Lord is my Good Shepherd" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons hosts the reproduction as public-domain.
classics.creditText: Bernhard Plockhorst, The Lord is my Good Shepherd
classics.sourceNotes: Strong shepherd imagery for the voice-and-flock motif.
